fact.fact: Daemon sends active assignment heartbeats every 5 seconds; control-plane treats 20 seconds without refresh as stale and must not let late traffic revive the lease
fact.human_doc_phrase: Active assignment heartbeat and stale lease fencing

downstreams.local_scope: uses a 20 second default active-assignment lease, fails stale active assignments during poll/heartbeat, and does not refresh expired leases
uses a 5 second default heartbeat cadence and cancels local provider runs when heartbeat response omits a requested active assignment
no generated client or visible thread API change; frontend sees existing typed thread/SSE state changes
